map_bindings.AlbedoAtlas: BaseColor candidate Texture2D atlas bound on each review material instance; shader graph sampling remains open.
map_bindings.NormalAtlas: Normal-response candidate Texture2D atlas bound on each review material instance; shader graph sampling remains open.
map_bindings.AORoughnessHeightAtlas: Packed R=AO, G=roughness, B=height candidate Texture2D atlas bound on each review material instance; shader graph sampling remains open.

promotion_gate: Review material-instance assets and their bound Texture2D atlas assets are created at the candidate paths, but production promotion still requires shader graph sampler wiring, capture comparison, guide/geospatial review, hazard readability, and desktop/VR performance evidence.
current_decision: Use these reviewed Unreal Material Instance Constant assets as the canonical handoff from first-party atlas Texture2D assets to shader work. The editor automation now creates the nine atlas Texture2D review assets, binds AlbedoAtlas, NormalAtlas, and AORoughnessHeightAtlas on all 18 MI_RaftSim_*_AtlasCandidate assets, and keeps them review-only until shader graph sampling, capture, guide/geospatial, hazard readability, and performance gates pass.
